title: godetia lassenensis var. sonomensis
intro: Godetia lassenensis var. sonomensis, also known as Sonoma godetia or Sonoma fairy cress, is a rare, perennial plant species native to the grasslands of Northern California. It belongs to the Polemoniaceae family, a group of flowering plants that are often used for their medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Godetia lassenensis var. sonomensis can be made into teas, salves, and infusions, which have been used to promote digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and boost the immune system.
